title: Low Rate Picture Transmission (LRPT)
short description: The Low Rate Picture Transmission (LRPT) is a digital transmission system, commonly transmitted by METEOR-M satellites, used to deliver weather images and data.
description: The **Low Rate Picture Transmission (LRPT)** is a digital transmission system, intended to deliver images and data from an orbital weather satellite directly to end users via a VHF radio signal. It is used aboard polar-orbiting, near-Earth weather satellite programs such as MetOp (LRPT permanently deactivated on MetOp-A due to interference with on HIRS) and NPOESS (replaced with JPSS), and is currently being used on METEOR-M satellites.
